title: Create: Block Plus
description: Create: Block Plus is a Addons of Create Mod
body:
Create: Block Plus is a Addons of Create Mod

 

Installation Requirements

![Create[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9bbd846b84cf38444db96138d9a114041398dbc.png)

This version of Create: Block Plus runs on Forge. Install the Forge and Create Mod.

 

This addon can be used in any modpack that wants it.

the addon add:

Veridium Stairs, Slab, Wall, Button, Pressure Plate
etc...
About

Welcome to Create: Block Plus, a addons of Create mod offering a variety of tools and blocks for Building.
